scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/core test:run && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/scraper test:run && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/web test:run
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/core test:unit && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/scraper test:unit && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/web test:unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/core test:integration && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/scraper test:integration && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/web test:integration
scripts.check:types: pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/core exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/scraper exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @my-offline-lms/web exec tsc --noEmit
